interface.shortDescription: Route bounded Farplane work to configured external coding-agent CLIs through explicit adapter/profile contracts, mana...
interface.longDescription: Route bounded Farplane work to configured external coding-agent CLIs through explicit adapter/profile contracts, managed prompts, runtime logs, and ticket evidence handoff. Use when another local CLI/model/harness is stronger for a task but Farplane must keep ticket, QA, review, and integration authority.
